title: Tachigali eriopetala
taxonomy: Tachigali eriopetala is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea or bean family. It is native to the tropical forests of South America. The classification of Tachigali eriopetala places it in the subfamily Faboideae and tribe Tachigaliaceae. Within the tribe Tachigaliaceae, Tachigali eriopetala is a distinct genus that consists of around 15 species. The classification of Tachigali eriopetala is subject to ongoing research and refinement in the field of botany.
